side_effects.description: Vertical fine lines appeared on right forehead after 10 days of twice-daily topical use. Lines described as accelerated aging/'copper uglies'. Skin became more fragile. Possible pore enlargement.

protocol_notes: Used ANAiRUi GHK-Cu serum topically twice daily for ~10 days. Stopped use after noticing fine lines. Lines were worse in morning (sleep position dependent) and faded by end of day. After stopping and changing sleep position from right to left side, lines gradually resolved over 4+ days. User hypothesized metalloproteinase overproduction from excess copper saturation in topical application caused collagen degradation.
